positive: A minimalist, geometric woodland scene featuring stylized outlines of various forest flora (ferns, stylized mushrooms, birch branches) combined with subtle, abstract topographical lines. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, designed for a clean apparel print. Utilize a limited, muted palette of forest greens, deep indigo, and warm cream tones. Style should be influenced by sophisticated Nordic woodblock printing and Art Deco geometry, ensuring clean, thick lines and excellent silhouette contrast against a white background. Full composition coverage, ideal for screen printing or direct-to-garment print. Highly detailed, vector graphic style.
negative: photorealistic, 3d, noise, blurry, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, messy, busy, dirty, gradient fade, chromatic aberration
